titleStmt.title: SII 27.86: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 86. (A.R. No. 609 of 1929-30.) PĀṆḌĒŚVARA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 8) set up in the prākāra of Śaṅkaranārāyaṇa temple.

This is dated Śaka 1330, Sarvajit (current), Kārttika śu. 1, Thursday. In the given year corresponding to 1407 A.D., the tithi occurred on October 2, when the weekday was Sunday. This appears to be intended date.

It records an assignment of gold due to the king from certain lands to the god Śaṅkaranārāyaṇa of Pāṇḍyēśvara for burning a perpetual lamp, by the king, the prajas and the heggaḍe and others of the village. It states that Bāchaṇṇa-oḍēya of Gōve was then governing Bārakūra-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ nirvighnamastu . namastuṁga
śiraḥ cuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trayalōkya nagarā
raṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavētu . dānapāla
nayōrmadhyē dānāśrēyōnrupālanaṁ dānātsvarga
mavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . svastiśrī ja
yādbhudaya śakavaruṣa 1330 neya varttamāna sa
rvvajitu saṁvatsarada kāttika śu 1 guruvāradaṁdu
svastiśrī mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēsvara śrīvī
ra pratāpa dēvarāya mahārāyaru sakala sāṁbrā
jyavanu pratipālisuva kāladalū Ā rāyara nirū
padiṁ gōveya bācaṁṇa Ūḍeyaru bārakūra rājya
vanāḷi sakaḷa dharmmaṁgaḷanū pālisuva kāladalli
pāṁḍyēsvarada saṁkharanārāyaṇadēvara naṁdā
dīvigeya dharṁmmakke baradunaṭṭa śilāśāsanada krama U
ṁteṁdare pāṁḍyēsvarada śaṁkharanārāyaṇadēvara pā
demariyādeyanu pāṁḍyēsvarada hattu praje Urava
ru mukkālu vaṭṭigaḷu heggeḍeyū Arasū kū
ḍi Ā saṁkhara nārāyaṇadēvara pādamūlagaḷu
kūḍi Aramanege bahapa maryāde Ayadu hoṁnanu naṁda
dīvigeya dharmakke dhāṟapaṟuvakavāgi Arasugaḷu koṭaru Ā caṁ
drārkkavāgi yibara sēnabōvara makkaḷu naḍasi baharu dēvasvada vivara nā
lakadamaṁdi murukēriya dharmada bāḷina mēre yeṟaḍu muḍehāne
hattu badu rabaḷu mēre rmu hāne 30 dukuṁ hari mu 11
hāne baḷu muḍe 11 ciṭṭuva baḷumēre muḍe 3 banakōḍu sō
nārīsvara mēre battamu 6 Aṟukudureya mēre batta mu 3
baliya dēva(va)sva battamuḍe 1 tuḷu veṭina baḷave batta muḍe 14 ci
na bāḷu haravariyiṁdaṁ muḍalu haraḷa basiriya keḷagina
kaṭiyaṁ teṁkalu hariva tōḍiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu hāḷeyiṁ
daṁ baḍagalu yi catusīmeyoḷage majakaḷamulanū naraya
ṇadēvariṁge pana Akiya taḷa sarvamāṁnya halasunāḍaguḍe
yoḷagaṇa bāḷu sarvamānya yipattanālku maḍe batta muḷagu
ḍe batta haneraḍu muḍe sa dīvige voṁdu hoṁnu muḷagaḍe ba
raṇa paṁḍēsarada ḍinauḷa mēre voṁdu Arahoṁnu sarvamānya
nū dēvara Amrutapaḍiya Āyavanu baḷa
muḍe 120 hāne hattu kiya kudure mēredēva
ra batta muḍe 45 sāvitriya battamuḍe 15 nuḷiye
batta nālpattu Utsavada kudure mēre voṁdu
haravariya bayaloḷage
Adaṟa Akkiya
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.86 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
